meta.listDescription: Review practitioner dues and create payout batches by period and currency.
meta.duesDescription: Review practitioner dues, record the payout, and upload proof when needed.
meta.batchesDescription: Review payout batches by period and currency, and open any batch to see its details.
meta.payoutsDescription: Review recorded payout records across the system.
meta.detailDescription: Review the batch snapshot and the admin actions available for it.
meta.statementDescription: Review the practitioner financial timeline and export it as a PDF-friendly statement.

statement.metaDescription: Review the practitioner financial timeline and export it as a PDF-friendly statement.
statement.title: Practitioner account statement
statement.note: Review one practitioner from the start of their activity, then export the filtered statement as PDF when needed.
statement.selectNote: Search and open a practitioner statement. The printed version keeps only the statement content.
statement.searchHint: Type to find a practitioner statement.
statement.noSelectionNote: Search and open a practitioner to review the statement timeline.

metrics.rowsHint: Ledger earnings and payout records in this view.
metrics.paidHint: Payout records recorded in the statement.

statement.filterNote: Filters affect the timeline and the printable PDF.
statement.multicurrencyHint: Select one currency to see monetary totals.
statement.noRowsNote: Try a different currency or date range.
statement.errorHeading: Statement is not available right now
statement.errorNote: Could not load the practitioner statement.

list.title: Practitioner payout batches
list.note: Review practitioner payouts by period and currency, then open any batch for details.
list.fastActionNote: Use the filters to narrow down the current payout batches.
list.emptyNote: Try a different period or currency, or clear the filters to show the full list.
list.errorHeading: Payout batches are not available right now

payouts.title: Payout operations
payouts.note: Shows all recorded payout operations (partial or full) with proof when available.

states.emptyNote: No payouts recorded yet, or no results match the current filters.

workspace.title: Practitioner payout workspace
workspace.note: This is the primary settlements surface now. Pick a practitioner, review what is due, record the payout, and attach proof when needed.
workspace.practitionerNote: Search a practitioner and open their payout-relevant dues and history in one place.
workspace.historyNote: Review the payout trail and open a payout detail when you need proof or operator context.

items.list: Review settlement batches with their total amount and item counts.
items.detail: Inspect batch-level details, summary counts, and practitioner settlement items.
items.generate: Generate a new settlement batch for a specific period and currency (admin-only).
items.marking: Mark a batch as paid or failed only when the backend allows it (admin-only).

items.noPayouts: This is not a payout processing system or provider integration.
items.noLedger: Ledger-level financial entries are not exposed here yet.
items.noFinanceSuite: This is a narrow operational baseline, not an accounting suite.

modal.title: Record practitioner payout
modal.description: Open a practitioner from the list and record the payout quickly.
modal.dueNote: Pick one due row. The amount must match exactly.
modal.noDueRows: No due rows are available for this practitioner.
modal.amountHint: The amount must match the selected due row.
modal.proofHint: Supported types: JPG, PNG, WEBP, or PDF.
modal.emptyState: Select a practitioner to open the quick payout flow.

validation.chooseDue: Choose a due row before saving.
validation.amountMismatch: The amount must match the selected due row.

modal.noSelection: Select a practitioner to open the quick payout flow.

generate.heading: Create payout batch
generate.description: Choose the period and currency to create a batch with payouts ready to review.
generate.note: If no eligible dues exist, the system may create an empty batch or show a helpful message depending on the configuration.

helperItems.defaultPath: Creates the eligible dues for the selected period and currency.
helperItems.backendDuplicateGuard: The system prevents duplicate batches for the same period and currency.
helperItems.zeroItemsPossible: A batch may be created with no items when nothing is eligible.

generate.confirmationNote: Creating the batch does not transfer money automatically.
generate.label: Admin only
generate.notePrimary: The batch is created for eligible dues only.
generate.noteSecondary: This step does not mean the bank transfer has already happened.
generate.noteTertiary: After the transfer, record the payment from the batch page.
generate.noteEmpty: If there are no eligible dues, the system may create an empty batch or show a helpful message.
generate.helper: Creating the batch prepares the eligible dues for payout review.
generate.validation: Enter a valid year, month, and currency.
generate.successEmpty: Payout batch created, but no eligible dues were found for this period and currency.
generate.adminOnlyNote: Creating payout batches is available to admin operators only.

empty.heading: No payout batches yet
empty.note: Once batches are created, they will appear here.

listError.heading: Payout batches are not available right now

detailError.heading: Payout batch is not available right now
detailError.note: Could not load this payout batch. Try again or return to the list.

notFound.heading: Payout batch was not found
notFound.note: This batch is not available in the current admin scope.

itemsEmpty.heading: No practitioner payouts yet
itemsEmpty.note: This batch does not contain practitioner payout rows.

detail.title: Payout batch detail
detail.note: Use this screen to review the batch summary, payout readiness, and the supported admin actions.

workflow.batchModeNote: This batch groups practitioner dues for one period and currency.
workflow.autoIncludeNote: Practitioners are added automatically for the selected period.
workflow.exceptionNote: Use the separate practitioner dues screen for a single-practitioner payout.

detail.summaryNote: This summary reflects the payouts tied to the batch.
detail.itemsNote: Each row shows one practitioner payout in this batch.

emptyBatch.heading: This batch has no eligible payouts
emptyBatch.note: The system created the batch, but there were no eligible dues for this period and currency, or they were already included elsewhere.

reasons.periodCurrency: The selected period or currency had no dues.
reasons.assignedElsewhere: The dues were already assigned to another batch.
reasons.exceptionPath: This payout needs the manual practitioner payout flow.

detail.actionsNote: Actions appear only for admin operators and remain subject to backend validation.
detail.actionsEmptyBatchNote: If a batch is empty, marking it paid or failed only changes its status.

actionMeaning.markPaid: Use this after the money has been transferred to practitioners.
actionMeaning.markFailed: Use this when the transfer could not be completed.

detail.boundaryNote: This screen stays focused on payout visibility and the supported admin actions.

boundaryItems.noPayouts: Creating the batch does not transfer money automatically.
boundaryItems.noAdjustments: Editing payout rows is not supported here.
boundaryItems.noAutoReconcile: Automatic reconciliation and accounting exports are not part of this baseline.

legacy.heading: Legacy settlement batches
legacy.note: Batch records remain available for historical and compatibility review only. They no longer define the primary settlements workflow.
legacy.errorHeading: Legacy batch review is not available right now

actions.adminOnly: These actions are available to admin operators only.

practitionerPayout.heading: Practitioner payout review
practitionerPayout.description: Find the practitioner first, then review due rows, record the payout, and attach proof when available.
practitionerPayout.helperNote: This is the primary practitioner payout workflow. Batch data remains historical only.
practitionerPayout.searchNote: Pick one practitioner to view due rows, payout history, and proof-backed payout detail.
practitionerPayout.dueNote: Choose one eligible row to record the payout. The amount must match the due amount exactly.
practitionerPayout.noSelection: Choose a practitioner to view dues and payout history.
practitionerPayout.recordNote: Enter the payout values only after you choose a due row.
practitionerPayout.proofOpenError: Could not open the proof file right now.
practitionerPayout.proofNote: Upload an image or PDF receipt for this payout record.
practitionerPayout.proofFormats: Supported types: JPG, PNG, WEBP, or PDF.
practitionerPayout.detailNote: Open a payout from history to inspect the payout detail and proof status.
practitionerPayout.detailPlaceholder: Select a payout from the history list to review it here.

validation.chooseSettlement: Choose a settlement row before recording the payout.
validation.amountMismatch: The payout amount must match the selected due row.
validation.chooseProof: Choose a proof file before uploading.

practitionerPayout.sourceNote: The payout source will be recorded automatically as a manual exception.

errors.batchExists: A settlement batch already exists for this period and currency.
errors.batchNotFound: The settlement batch could not be found.
errors.invalidState: This settlement batch is not in a valid state for that action.
errors.invalidFilters: Filters are not valid for the current settlements list.
errors.forbiddenScope: You do not have access to this settlement scope.
errors.notFound: The settlement data is not available in the current scope.
errors.generic: Could not complete this settlement action right now.
